requirement_topic.en: SANEDI Mandatory Energy Label — 5-Star Scheme for Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: SANEDI强制能效标签——空调器5星级方案
requirement_topic.zht: SANEDI強制能效標籤——空調器5星級方案

summary.en: The South African National Energy Development Institute (SANEDI) administers the mandatory energy labelling programme for air conditioners under South Africa's Energy Efficiency Regulations (promulgated under the National Energy Act, Act 34 of 2008). Air conditioners, including heat pump air conditioners, must carry the mandatory South African energy efficiency label (5-star rating scheme) indicating the product's EER (Energy Efficiency Ratio) and star rating before sale. Products must comply with applicable minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) set under the regulations. Labelling and MEPS compliance must be demonstrated with test data measured against the applicable SANS test standard.
summary.zh: 南非国家能源发展研究所（SANEDI）依据南非《能效法规》（根据2008年第34号《国家能源法》颁布）对空调器强制实施能效标签计划。空调器（包括热泵空调器）在销售前须张贴南非强制能效标签（5星级评级方案），标注能效比（EER）和星级。产品须符合法规规定的最低能效标准（MEPS）。标签和最低能效标准符合性须通过按适用SANS测试标准测量的测试数据证明。
summary.zht: 南非國家能源發展研究所（SANEDI）依據南非《能效法規》（根據2008年第34號《國家能源法》頒布）對空調器強制實施能效標籤計畫。空調器（包括熱泵空調器）在銷售前須張貼南非強制能效標籤（5星級評級方案），標注能效比（EER）和星級。產品須符合法規規定的最低能效標準（MEPS）。標籤和最低能效標準符合性須通過按適用SANS測試標準測量的測試數據證明。

standards_or_laws: National Energy Act (Act 34 of 2008), South Africa
Energy Efficiency Regulations (GN R390, as amended) — mandatory energy labelling and MEPS for air conditioners
SANS / IEC 60335-2-40 — test basis for energy performance measurement

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency label scheme for room air conditioners requires a Chinese Energy Label (CEL) rated on a 1–5 scale under GB 12021.3 (minimum energy performance) and GB 21455 (seasonal energy efficiency, SEER/HSPF). Chinese EER/SEER data and Chinese energy label star ratings are not directly transferable to the South African 5-star scheme and MEPS thresholds.
summary.zh: 中国对房间空调器实施强制能效标识制度，依据GB 12021.3（最低能效标准）和GB 21455（季节能效，SEER/HSPF）按1至5级评定中国能效标识（CEL）。中国EER/SEER数据和中国能效标识等级不能直接转换为南非5星级方案和最低能效标准门槛。
summary.zht: 中國對房間空調器實施強制能效標識制度，依據GB 12021.3（最低能效標準）和GB 21455（季節能效，SEER/HSPF）按1至5級評定中國能效標識（CEL）。中國EER/SEER數據和中國能效標識等級不能直接轉換為南非5星級方案和最低能效標準門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — Minimum energy performance standards for room air conditioners (SEER/HSPF)
GB 12021.3 — Minimum energy performance standard for room air conditioners

gap.en: South Africa's 5-star energy label and MEPS are mandatory for air conditioners and heat pump air conditioners before sale. Chinese GB 21455 and CEL data are based on different test conditions and star-rating boundaries. Exporters must have products independently tested and rated under the South African scheme; Chinese energy label data cannot be used directly. The South African grid operates at 230 V / 50 Hz, which may affect measured EER compared to Chinese 220 V conditions.
gap.zh: 南非5星级能效标签和最低能效标准对空调器和热泵空调器在销售前为强制性要求。中国GB 21455和中国能效标识数据基于不同的测试条件和星级边界。出口商须按南非方案对产品进行独立测试和评级；中国能效标识数据不能直接使用。南非电网为230V/50Hz，与中国220V条件相比可能影响测得的EER值。
gap.zht: 南非5星級能效標籤和最低能效標準對空調器和熱泵空調器在銷售前為強制性要求。中國GB 21455和中國能效標識數據基於不同的測試條件和星級邊界。出口商須按南非方案對產品進行獨立測試和評級；中國能效標識數據不能直接使用。南非電網為230V/50Hz，與中國220V條件相比可能影響測得的EER值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — energy label and MEPS compliance required before sale under Energy Efficiency Regulations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic-market air conditioners under GB 21455 and CEL scheme; not equivalent to South African 5-star scheme

source.publisher: South African National Energy Development Institute (SANEDI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — South African 5-star energy label and MEPS are mandatory before sale; Chinese CEL/GB 21455 data cannot be directly used. Independent testing under the South African scheme and 230 V / 50 Hz test conditions is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——南非5星级能效标签和最低能效标准为销售前强制性要求；中国能效标识/GB 21455数据不能直接使用。须在南非方案和230V/50Hz测试条件下进行独立测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——南非5星級能效標籤和最低能效標準為銷售前強制性要求；中國能效標識/GB 21455數據不能直接使用。須在南非方案和230V/50Hz測試條件下進行獨立測試。

requirement_topic.en: SANEDI MEPS — Minimum Energy Performance Standards Threshold for Heat Pump Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: SANEDI最低能效标准——热泵空调器能效门槛
requirement_topic.zht: SANEDI最低能效標準——熱泵空調器能效門檻

summary.en: Under South Africa's Energy Efficiency Regulations, heat pump air conditioners must meet minimum energy efficiency ratio (EER) thresholds — the MEPS floor — before they may lawfully be sold in the South African market. Products that fall below the minimum EER floor (corresponding to 1-star or below the regulated baseline) may not be imported or sold. The applicable MEPS tier and EER threshold depend on product type, cooling capacity, and the current schedule in force under the regulations. Compliance evidence must reference test data to the applicable SANS performance test standard.
summary.zh: 依据南非《能效法规》，热泵空调器须达到最低能效比（EER）门槛（即MEPS基准线），方可在南非市场合法销售。低于最低EER基准线（对应1星或低于法规规定基准线）的产品不得进口或销售。适用的MEPS档次和EER门槛取决于产品类型、制冷量及法规现行附表。合规证明须引用按适用SANS性能测试标准测得的测试数据。
summary.zht: 依據南非《能效法規》，熱泵空調器須達到最低能效比（EER）門檻（即MEPS基準線），方可在南非市場合法銷售。低於最低EER基準線（對應1星或低於法規規定基準線）的產品不得進口或銷售。適用的MEPS檔次和EER門檻取決於產品類型、製冷量及法規現行附表。合規證明須引用按適用SANS性能測試標準測得的測試數據。

standards_or_laws: Energy Efficiency Regulations (GN R390, as amended) — MEPS schedule for air conditioners
National Energy Act (Act 34 of 2008), South Africa

summary.en: China's GB 21455 sets MEPS floors and seasonal energy efficiency tiers (SEER, HSPF) for room air conditioners, with mandatory minimum grades enforced under the CEL scheme. Chinese MEPS thresholds and efficiency grades are calculated under Chinese test conditions (GB/T 7725 measurement method) and are not directly comparable to South African EER-based MEPS thresholds measured at South African test conditions.
summary.zh: 中国GB 21455对房间空调器设定了最低能效标准基准线和季节能效档次（SEER、HSPF），并通过中国能效标识制度强制实施最低能效等级。中国最低能效标准门槛和能效等级依据中国测试条件（GB/T 7725测量方法）计算，与在南非测试条件下测量的基于EER的南非最低能效标准门槛不能直接对比。
summary.zht: 中國GB 21455對房間空調器設定了最低能效標準基準線和季節能效檔次（SEER、HSPF），並通過中國能效標識制度強制實施最低能效等級。中國最低能效標準門檻和能效等級依據中國測試條件（GB/T 7725測量方法）計算，與在南非測試條件下測量的基於EER的南非最低能效標準門檻不能直接對比。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7725 — performance test method for room air conditioners

gap.en: South Africa's EER-based MEPS threshold must be met at South African test conditions (230 V / 50 Hz). Chinese GB 21455 MEPS grades and SEER values cannot be mapped directly to the South African threshold without retesting. Products must be tested and verified against the current MEPS schedule in force under the Energy Efficiency Regulations before sale. Exporters should obtain the current MEPS schedule from SANEDI and confirm which capacity band and product type classification applies.
gap.zh: 南非基于EER的最低能效标准门槛须在南非测试条件（230V/50Hz）下达到。中国GB 21455的最低能效等级和SEER值未经重新测试不能直接对应南非门槛。产品销售前须按《能效法规》现行最低能效标准附表进行测试和验证。出口商应向SANEDI获取现行最低能效标准附表，并确认适用的能力段和产品类型分类。
gap.zht: 南非基於EER的最低能效標準門檻須在南非測試條件（230V/50Hz）下達到。中國GB 21455的最低能效等級和SEER值未經重新測試不能直接對應南非門檻。產品銷售前須按《能效法規》現行最低能效標準附表進行測試和驗證。出口商應向SANEDI獲取現行最低能效標準附表，並確認適用的能力段和產品類型分類。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products below the applicable MEPS EER floor may not be sold in South Africa
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory minimum efficiency under GB 21455 and CEL; method and thresholds not equivalent to South African MEPS

source.publisher: South African National Energy Development Institute (SANEDI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — South African MEPS EER floor is mandatory for sale; Chinese GB 21455 SEER grades are not equivalent. Retesting at 230 V / 50 Hz and verification against the current SANEDI MEPS schedule are required before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——南非最低能效标准EER基准线为销售强制性要求；中国GB 21455的SEER等级不具等同性。须在230V/50Hz条件下重新测试，并在进口前对照现行SANEDI最低能效标准附表进行核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——南非最低能效標準EER基準線為銷售強制性要求；中國GB 21455的SEER等級不具等同性。須在230V/50Hz條件下重新測試，並在進口前對照現行SANEDI最低能效標準附表進行核驗。
